ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Partner_Opportunity', Number_of_IR_35_Tool_Products__c > 0, TEXT(IR_35_Tool_Approval_Status__c) <> 'Approved', CASE(StageName, 'Closed Won', 1, 'Agreement', 1, 0) = 1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV 13:Please submit the record for IR35 Tool Approval before moving ahead.
